page.content: In the rapidly evolving landscape of e-commerce, understanding the dynamics of category mix by GMV (Gross Merchandise Value) is paramount for strategic decision-making. The following data table delineates the performance of various product categories across key metrics, including Live commerce conversion rates and Marketplace take rates, providing a comprehensive overview of consumer behavior and revenue generation potential. Notably, the data reflects quarterly trends, enabling stakeholders to identify seasonal fluctuations and capitalize on high-performing categories, such as those achieving an Average Order Value (AOV) exceeding £450M.

page.content: The analysis also reveals the effectiveness of live streaming as a sales channel, with conversion rates reaching up to 15.0%, indicating a substantial shift in consumer engagement strategies.

page.content: Furthermore, the Marketplace take rates, varying between 10.5% and 12.3%, offer insights into the profitability of different categories, thereby informing pricing strategies and commission models.
